name: Little Cheddar Biscuits
recipeInstructions:
1. In a medium bowl, combine the flour, dry mustard, paprika, and baking powder.
2. Beat the butter with a fork or electric mixer at medium speed until light and fluffy.
3. Gradually add the grated cheddar cheese and Worcestershire sauce to the butter mixture.
4. Gradually incorporate the flour mixture into the butter mixture using a fork, stirring until well combined.
5. Shape the dough into a long roll about 1 3/4 inches in diameter on a lightly floured surface.
6. Wrap the dough in plastic wrap or foil and refrigerate for at least 2 hours, preferably overnight.
7. Preheat the oven to 325 degrees F (160 degrees C).
8. Slice the dough into pieces about 1/3 inch thick.
9. Roll each piece into a ball with your hands.
10. Flatten slightly and place on an ungreased baking sheet about 2 inches apart.
11. Bake for 8 minutes in the preheated oven until lightly browned on the bottom.
